# kUSBInformationDeviceIsInternalMask

**Enumeration Case**

The mask indicating that the USB device is internal.

## Declaration

```swift
kUSBInformationDeviceIsInternalMask = (1 << kUSBInformationDeviceIsInternalBit)
```
title: kUSBInformationDeviceIsInternalMask
